---
name: Client UI Feature
about: Create a new UI task for the desktop application
title: '[Client] '
labels: 'client, ui, enhancement'
assignees: ''
---
**Description:**
We need a new page/view in the desktop app to manage `[Feature Name]` using the backend endpoints. Please refer to `[Insert Link to Existing UI Feature]` to see how our datagrid pages and update dialogs are structured.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Create the necessary view featuring a DataGrid or relevant layout.
- [ ] Define the exact required DataGrid columns.
- [ ] Implement necessary dropdown or toggle filters (e.g., Status: Active/Inactive).
- [ ] Implement an Action Button Menu and/or Right-Click Context Menu on the grid rows for specific actions.
- [ ] Implement a Dialog prompt for updates or creations.
- [ ] Ensure the UI properly handles and displays validation errors returned from the API.
- [ ] DataGrid should refresh to reflect the updated state after any modification.
